title: Day 8 Challenge — Will Have
challengeTask: Write and speak 10 sentences about your future goals and deadlines using 'will have' correctly.
hindiTask: अपने future goals और deadlines के बारे में 10 sentences लिखें और बोलें, 'will have' का सही इस्तेमाल करते हुए।
successCriteria: Used 'will have + V3' correctly in all sentences
Included at least one specific future time marker (by, in, before)
No errors like 'will has' or missing 'have'
bonusChallenge: Write a short professional email to your manager about a project deadline using Future Perfect.
